productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Gun Metal Leatherette Metallic Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your traditional side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 27 cm Height: 12 cm Made of synthetic leather with a shimmery finish and nylon lining Flap with magnetic closure and has stone embellishments One main compartment with a magnetic clasp One zippered compartment with a mobile pouch Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
